name: codex-ultracode
description: Codex-native Ultracode skill plugin for exhaustive multi-agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Exhaustive multi-agent workflow skill for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Ultracode packages a Codex-native skill that plans complex work, decomposes it into packets, delegates to available subagents, verifies adversarially, and reports the result with durable artifacts.
